findings.description: The 環境構築 h2 section contains multiple h3 subsections (バックアップ用スキーマの作成, コンポーネント設定ファイルに監視対象テーブルを記載, ログ出力設定) and its plain text content exceeds 2000 characters, but the entire section is collapsed into a single knowledge section (s4) rather than split into separate indexed sections.
findings.source_evidence: RST h3 headings under 環境構築: 'バックアップ用スキーマの作成、データ投入', 'コンポーネント設定ファイルに監視対象テーブルを記載', 'ログ出力設定'. Content includes a settings table, XML config block, and two log property file blocks.

findings.description: PascalCase class names `BasicLoggerFactory` and `StandardOutputLogWriter` appear in the log.properties code example but are missing from s4 hints.
